name: inventchip
description: InventChip Technology is a leading Chinese manufacturer of Silicon Carbide (SiC) power semiconductors, offering high-performance SiC MOSFETs and modules for electric vehicles, renewable energy, and industrial applications.
longDescription: InventChip Technology has emerged as a key player in the global SiC power semiconductor market, specializing in the design and manufacture of high-quality SiC MOSFETs and power modules. With state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities and strong R&D capabilities, InventChip delivers cost-effective wide bandgap solutions without compromising on performance or reliability. The company's product portfolio covers voltage ratings from 650V to 1700V, serving rapidly growing markets including EV/HEV, solar inverters, energy storage systems, and industrial power supplies. InventChip's commitment to quality and innovation has made it a trusted supplier for both domestic Chinese and international customers.

coreProducts.name: SiC MOSFETs
coreProducts.description: High-performance SiC MOSFETs with planar and trench technology

coreProducts.name: SiC Power Modules
coreProducts.description: Integrated SiC modules for high-power applications

coreProducts.name: SiC Bare Die
coreProducts.description: SiC die for custom module assembly

coreProducts.name: Gate Drivers
coreProducts.description: Optimized gate drivers for SiC devices

seoTitle: InventChip Technology | SiC MOSFETs, Power Modules | LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of InventChip SiC MOSFETs and power modules. Technical support for EV, solar, and industrial applications in China and global markets.

faqs.question: What makes InventChip SiC MOSFETs competitive?
faqs.answer: InventChip competitive advantages: (1) Cost-effective - Competitive pricing vs international brands. (2) Performance - Comparable electrical characteristics. (3) Quality - ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 certified. (4) Automotive - AEC-Q101 qualified devices. (5) Support - Local technical support in China. (6) Supply - Stable domestic supply chain. (7) Innovation - Continuous R&D investment. InventChip offers excellent value for SiC solutions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose InventChip for cost-effective SiC solutions with local support.

faqs.question: What voltage ratings does InventChip offer?
faqs.answer: InventChip voltage ratings: (1) SiC MOSFETs - 650V to 1700V. (2) Modules - 1200V to 1700V. (3) Popular - 650V and 1200V for EV. (4) High voltage - 1700V for industrial. (5) Bare die - Available for custom modules. (6) Future - 3300V in development. (7) Applications - EV, solar, industrial. InventChip covers mainstream SiC voltage ratings.
faqs.decisionGuide: InventChip provides 650V-1700V SiC devices for most applications.

faqs.question: Are InventChip devices automotive qualified?
faqs.answer: Yes, InventChip offers automotive qualified devices: (1) AEC-Q101 - Full automotive qualification. (2) IATF 16949 - Automotive quality system. (3) PPAP - Production part approval support. (4) Voltage range - 650V to 1700V for EV. (5) Applications - Traction inverters, OBC, DC-DC. (6) Reliability - Enhanced for automotive. (7) Support - Dedicated automotive FAE team. InventChip supports the full range of EV applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: InventChip automotive SiC MOSFETs are ideal for EV applications.

faqs.question: What is InventChip's manufacturing capability?
faqs.answer: InventChip manufacturing: (1) Fab - State-of-the-art SiC fab in Suzhou. (2) Capacity - Expanding to meet demand. (3) Technology - Planar and trench MOSFET. (4) Quality - ISO 9001 certified. (5) Automotive - IATF 16949 certified. (6) Modules - In-house module assembly. (7) Testing - 100% wafer and final test. Strong manufacturing capability ensures supply security.
faqs.decisionGuide: InventChip has robust manufacturing with expanding capacity.

faqs.question: Does InventChip offer power modules?
faqs.answer: Yes, InventChip offers SiC power modules: (1) Half-bridge - Standard configurations. (2) Full-bridge - For inverters. (3) Custom - Customer-specific designs. (4) Voltage - 1200V and 1700V. (5) Current - Up to 600A. (6) Packages - Industry-standard footprints. (7) Applications - EV, solar, industrial. Modules simplify system design.
faqs.decisionGuide: InventChip modules offer integrated SiC solutions for high power.

faqs.question: What support does LiTong provide for InventChip products?
faqs.answer: LiTong InventChip support: (1) Local FAE - China-based support team. (2) Design review - Schematic and layout. (3) Reference designs - EV, solar applications. (4) Evaluation kits - Hardware for testing. (5) Samples - Fast sample delivery. (6) Training - Technical workshops. (7) Supply - Local inventory and logistics. Comprehensive local support for China market.
faqs.decisionGuide: LiTong provides full local support for InventChip in China.
